name: live freshness gate validates a compliance-citing operation before allowing it to proceed
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance/last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite-control --framework nist-csf-2 --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window weekly 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gate=pass' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
